mechanism_narrative: Elevated federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future corporate earnings, directly compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in high-rate periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rapid deterioration in the unemployment rate signals an imminent labor market contraction that reduces consumer spending and corporate profit growth, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or out-of-sample hit rate falls below 45%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates synchronized strength in consumer and housing demand, which amplifies corporate revenue growth and produces positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive deviations in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict positive 60d returns with a t-statistic below 1.96, or interaction term loses significance in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month increase in the index of industrial production reflects immediate improvements in manufacturing and utility output, which reduces supply chain bottlenecks and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive INDPRO momentum yields negative 5d returns in > 55% of observations during tightening periods, or Rank IC < 0.02 over rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 4.0% while core inflation remains above 3.0%, the resulting real rate compression forces aggressive portfolio de-risking, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint condition yields positive 20d returns in > 65% of cases, or the interaction effect shows zero predictive power (p > 0.10) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in total nonfarm payrolls expands the aggregate labor force and wage base, which directly supports long-term consumer demand and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows zero predictive power for 60d returns (Rank IC < 0.01) across all macro regimes, or signal direction flips to negative in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts dropping below 1.8 million units signals a severe contraction in residential construction activity, which cascades through durable goods demand and produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances when HOUST crosses below the threshold, or threshold signal loses statistical significance (p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent upward revisions in industrial production and real GDP growth confirm broad-based supply-side momentum that outpaces demand constraints, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint positive signal fails to predict positive 5d returns with statistical significance (p > 0.05) in walk-forward testing, or combined proxy IC remains below 0.03.
